'''kodayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twaddlesome|twaddlesome]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twaddlesome|twaddlesome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kodayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodayithi|kodayithi]] || [[word:kodayiji|kodayiji]] || [[word:kodayishi|kodayishi]] || [[word:kodayiki|kodayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodayuthuthu|kodayuthuthu]] || [[word:kodayujuju|kodayujuju]] || [[word:kodayushushu|kodayushushu]] || [[word:kodayukuku|kodayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodayuthu|kodayuthu]] || [[word:kodayuju|kodayuju]] || [[word:kodayushu|kodayushu]] || [[word:kodayuku|kodayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodayufthuf|kodayufthuf]] || [[word:kodayufjuf|kodayufjuf]] || [[word:kodayufshuf|kodayufshuf]] || [[word:kodayufkuf|kodayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodayethe|kodayethe]] || [[word:kodayeje|kodayeje]] || [[word:kodayeshe|kodayeshe]] || [[word:kodayeke|kodayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodayothotho|kodayothotho]] || [[word:kodayojojo|kodayojojo]] || [[word:kodayoshosho|kodayoshosho]] || [[word:kodayokoko|kodayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodayotho|kodayotho]] || [[word:kodayojo|kodayojo]] || [[word:kodayosho|kodayosho]] || [[word:kodayoko|kodayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodayofthof|kodayofthof]] || [[word:kodayofjof|kodayofjof]] || [[word:kodayofshof|kodayofshof]] || [[word:kodayofkof|kodayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfthÃŸf|kodayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfjÃŸf|kodayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfshÃŸf|kodayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfkÃŸf|kodayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kodayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kodayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kodayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kodayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfthÃŸf|kodayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfjÃŸf|kodayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfshÃŸf|kodayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfkÃŸf|kodayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfthÃŸf|kodayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfjÃŸf|kodayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfshÃŸf|kodayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kodayÃŸfkÃŸf|kodayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kodayÃḊthÃḊ|kodayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kodayÃḊjÃḊ|kodayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kodayÃḊshÃḊ|kodayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kodayÃḊkÃḊ|kodayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kodayathatha|kodayathatha]] || [[word:kodayajaja|kodayajaja]] || [[word:kodayashasha|kodayashasha]] || [[word:kodayakaka|kodayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kodayatha|kodayatha]] || [[word:kodayaja|kodayaja]] || [[word:kodayasha|kodayasha]] || [[word:kodayaka|kodayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kodayafthaf|kodayafthaf]] || [[word:kodayafjaf|kodayafjaf]] || [[word:kodayafshaf|kodayafshaf]] || [[word:kodayafkaf|kodayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kodayasha|kodayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodayshÃḋsha|kodayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodayrosha|kodayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodaymusha|kodaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodayasha|kodayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodaynkshÃḋsha|gokodaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodaynkrosha|gokodaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodaynkmusha|gokodaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodaynkyasha|gokodaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kodadayasha|kodadayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodadayshÃḋsha|kodadayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodadayrosha|kodadayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodadaymusha|kodadaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodadayasha|kodadayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodadaynkshÃḋsha|gokodadaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodadaynkrosha|gokodadaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodadaynkmusha|gokodadaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodadaynkyasha|gokodadaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kedÃḊyasha|kedÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kedÃḊyshÃḋsha|kedÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kedÃḊyrosha|kedÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kedÃḊymusha|kedÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kedÃḊyasha|kedÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokedÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gokedÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokedÃḊynkrosha|gokedÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokedÃḊynkmusha|gokedÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokedÃḊynkyasha|gokedÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kodfayasha|kodfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kodfayshÃḋsha|kodfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kodfayrosha|kodfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kodfaymusha|kodfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kodfayasha|kodfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokodfaynkshÃḋsha|gokodfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokodfaynkrosha|gokodfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokodfaynkmusha|gokodfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokodfaynkyasha|gokodfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
